spec_match.rationale: Highly accurate, showcasing how to map CSS env() properties to custom variables and query them via JS computed styles.

interactive.rationale: Excellent slider widget simulating margins from 0mm to 20mm, dynamically rendering unprintable borders and adjusting the inner safe zone.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Explains screen vs print runtime behavior perfectly, clarifying why screen layouts render 0px in env().

edge_cases.rationale: Delineates standard laser printer boundaries and fallback handling.

references.rationale: Correctly cites the ChromeStatus entry and connected CSSWG draft repository issues.

design_system.rationale: Uses clean, responsive custom panel wrappers and proper WCAG AA contrasting colors.

summary: The print-margin-inspector is an outstanding, high-fidelity developer demonstration that maps native CSS custom properties to JS computed values and features a live slider simulation.
